name: Juggernaut
description: Yurnero, the Juggernaut No one has ever seen the face hidden beneath the mask of Yurnero the Juggernaut. It is only speculation that he even has one.

abilities.name: Bladeform
abilities.description: Grants self bonus base and bonus movement speed when Juggernaut is not taking damage. Dispels the Bladeform buff upon taking a damage instance greater than the damage threshold.

abilities.name: Blade Fury
abilities.description: Becomes debuff immune and deals damage to nearby enemy units within a fixed interval. Applies a strong dispel at the end of the spin.

abilities.name: Healing Ward
abilities.description: Summons a Healing Ward which heals nearby allied units a portion of their max health. Increases ward hit count and the max health as health regeneration bonus.

abilities.name: Blade Dance
abilities.description: Grants Juggernaut a chance to deal critical damage on each attack. Grants attacks that proc Blade Dance lifesteal. Lifesteal is less effective when attacking creeps.

abilities.name: Swiftslash
abilities.description: Blocks only the first damage instance.

abilities.name: Omnislash
abilities.description: sources procs on and blocks only the first damage instance.
